title: Structure, Not Size: The Sample and Parameter Complexity of State Tracking in Selective State-Space Models (reproduction code)
description: Reproduction code for the paper "Structure, Not Size: The Sample and Parameter Complexity of State Tracking in Selective State-Space Models." The repository contains the selective PD-SSM, diagonal SSM, and GRU implementations (MLX), the procedural generators for cyclic, symmetric, dihedral, and random permutation automata, the training loop, and the experiment scripts that produce every table and figure in the paper. All experiments use only synthetic data generated by the accompanying code. Each reported number traces to a script under code/ and a JSON artifact under results/.
